caption: A man wearing a green baseball cap, black headphones, and a green t-shirt featuring the text "ION NEVER DO SHIT" is speaking into a professional black microphone. He is in a room with walls decorated with framed photographs and a white mannequin wearing a white garment in the background. To the right, clothing racks filled with garments are visible. On-screen graphics include a circular logo on the left and the text "BOODLY FLY" with smaller text below it on the right. Throughout the sequence, the man's expression and posture shift as he speaks; he begins with his right hand raised in a gesture and an open mouth, then settles into a more neutral expression with his mouth closed and his head slightly tilted. The background remains static while the man's head and hand move slightly between the frames.
